nodes.label: traveler | be | journey
nodes.sentence: Several travelers were on a journey together, sharing each other's hardships and comforts equally.

nodes.label: i | wish | ∅
nodes.sentence: I wished to join them, but they refused.

nodes.label: i | say | ∅
nodes.sentence: I said, "It is not the way of noble men to turn away from the company of the poor and lose the chance to benefit from them.

nodes.label: i | consider | ∅
nodes.sentence: I consider myself strong and able to help, not a burden.

nodes.label: i | assist | ∅
nodes.sentence: Even if I do not ride an animal, I can assist in carrying the blankets."

nodes.label: one | reply | ∅
nodes.sentence: One of them replied, "Do not be upset by what you hear.

nodes.label: thief | come | ∅
nodes.sentence: Some days ago, a thief disguised as a dervish came and joined us.

nodes.label: people | know | nature
nodes.sentence:
"

How can people know a person’s true nature by their clothes?

nodes.label: writer | know | ∅
nodes.sentence: The writer knows what is truly inside the book.

nodes.label: other | have | suspicion
nodes.sentence: Since dervishes are known for their humble appearance, the others had no suspicion and welcomed the thief as a friend.

nodes.label: appearance | be | clothing
nodes.sentence: The outward appearance of the seekers of truth is their patched clothing, which is enough to show who they are to others.

nodes.label: ∅ | strive | ∅
nodes.sentence: But strive to be good in your deeds, no matter what you wear.

nodes.label: holiness | lie | ∅
nodes.sentence: Put a crown on your head or a flag on your back if you wish; true holiness lies in abandoning the world, lust, and desire—not just in wearing a robe.

nodes.label: man | show | courage
nodes.sentence: A man must show courage and strength in battle.

nodes.label: weapon | be | good
nodes.sentence: What good are weapons to someone who lacks true manhood?

nodes.label: we | travel | nightfall
nodes.sentence: We traveled until nightfall and camped near a fort.

nodes.label: thief | take | pot
nodes.sentence: The shameless thief took a companion’s water pot, pretending he was going to perform ablutions, but he left to steal.

nodes.label: saint | turn | robe
nodes.sentence: A fake saint who wears the dervish’s garb has turned the sacred robes of the Ka'bah into a cover for a donkey.

nodes.label: he | reach | tower
nodes.sentence: After slipping away unseen by the dervishes, he reached a tower and stole a chest.

nodes.label: man | flee | dawn
nodes.sentence: By dawn, the evil man had fled far away.

nodes.label: they | arrest | ∅
nodes.sentence: When the others awoke, innocent and unaware, they were all arrested and thrown into prison at the fort.

nodes.label: we | give | ∅
nodes.sentence: From then on, we gave up traveling in company and chose the path of solitude, following the saying: Safety lies in being alone.

nodes.label: honor | remain | anyone
nodes.sentence: When one from a group does wrong, no honor remains for anyone, whether low or high.

nodes.label: you | see | ∅
nodes.sentence: Don’t you see how one ox in the pasture can stain all the oxen in the village?

nodes.label: i | deny | benefit
nodes.sentence: I replied, "Thanks be to God, I have not been denied the benefits that dervishes enjoy, even though I have left their company.

nodes.label: ∅ | be | ∅
nodes.sentence: What you have told me is valuable, and this warning will serve those like me throughout life.

nodes.label: heart | sadden | man
nodes.sentence:
"

For one rude man in a gathering, the hearts of wise men are deeply saddened.

nodes.label: dog | pollute | whole
nodes.sentence: If a tank is filled with rose water, a dog falling into it will pollute the whole.
